metadata.description: User authentication and profile management for tutors and clients

MUST: Authentication MUST use Django's built-in authentication system
User passwords MUST be hashed using Django's default password hasher
User model MUST support custom user types (tutor/client)
All profile creation MUST be transactional
User session MUST timeout after 24 hours of inactivity
Admin actions MUST redirect to authorized dashboard
Login form validation MUST check for case-insensitive email conflicts
Password reset MUST send verification email
SHOULD: Registration form SHOULD provide real-time validation
User profiles SHOULD include avatar images
Authentication SHOULD log failed login attempts
Email verification SHOULD be required before profile access
User settings SHOULD be editable without re-authentication
MAY: Email notifications MAY be sent on profile updates
Social authentication MAY be integrated in future versions
Two-factor authentication MAY be added as security enhancement
User activity logs MAY be stored for audit purposes
MUST_NOT: User passwords MUST NOT be stored in plain text
Session tokens MUST NOT be exposed in URLs
Personal data MUST NOT be logged to console in production
CSRF protection MUST NOT be disabled
